ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* The total area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* The official website of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the state */,
  "share_unemployed_seasonal" REAL /* Share of unemployed seasonal workers in the state */,
  "share_population_in_metro_areas" REAL /* Share of population living in metropolitan areas in the state */,
  "share_population_with_high_school_degree" REAL /* Share of population with a high school degree or higher in the state */,
  "share_non_citizen" REAL /* Share of non-citizens in the state */,
  "share_white_poverty" REAL /* Share of white population living in poverty in the state */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index of the state (a measure of income inequality) */,
  "share_non_white" REAL /* Share of non-white population in the state */,
  "share_voters_voted_trump" REAL /* Share of voters who voted for Trump in the state */,
  "share_female_population" REAL /* Share of female population in the state */,
  "share_male_population" REAL /* Share of male population in the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state in people per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hate_crimes" (
  "hate_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hate crime data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "hate_crimes_per_100k_splc" REAL /* Number of hate crimes per 100,000 people in the state (according to SPLC) */,
  "avg_hatecrimes_per_100k_fbi" REAL /* Average number of hate crimes per 100,000 people in the state (according to FBI) */,
  "hate_crimes_against_asians" INTEGER /* Number of hate crimes against Asians in the state */,
  "hate_crimes_against_african_americans" INTEGER /* Number of hate crimes against African Americans in the state */,
  "hate_crimes_against_lgbtq" INTEGER /* Number of hate crimes against LGBTQ individuals in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hate_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hate_crimes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate in the state */,
  "bachelor_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Share of population with a bachelor's degree or higher in the state */,
  "high_school_dropout_rate" REAL /* High school dropout rate in the state */,
  "share_population_with_master_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Share of population with a master's degree or higher in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "share_employed_in_service_sector" REAL /* Share of employed population in the service sector in the state */,
  "share_employed_in_manufacturing_sector" REAL /* Share of employed population in the manufacturing sector in the state */,
  "share_employed_in_agriculture_sector" REAL /* Share of employed population in the agriculture sector in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
